title: Metrics and analytics
excerpt: description: View R2 storage and operations metrics via the dashboard or GraphQL Analytics API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 exposes analytics that allow you to inspect the requests and storage of the buckets in your account. The metrics displayed for a bucket in the [Cloudflare dashboard ↗](https://dash.cloudflare.com/) are queried from Cloudflare's [GraphQL Analytics API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/analytics/graphql-api/). You can access the metrics [programmatically](#query-via-the-graphql-api) via GraphQL or HTTP client.
